Hero.heading: Minder AI
Hero.leadLine1: Increase workforce productivity, capture every action as data,

HeroSequence.heading: Minder AI

problem.title: Manual data entry eats the day
problem.body: Every box is packed, checked, then typed by hand. The hours pile up exactly where nobody is looking.

HeroSequence.transcript: Box A-7734, twelve units, packed by Minh, two cracked on the left corner, moved to bay 3.

order.title: Captured
order.subtitle: One breath of speech, structured.
order.hint: No two entries look the same — which is exactly why it is spoken, not typed.

handoff.title: That was one moment. Minder AI runs the whole floor.

steps.title: Install the Hardware
points: Set up Minder AI in the work area
Celesnity engineers deploy and configure the system on-site

steps.title: Configure the Software
points: Connect Minder AI to existing processes

steps.title: Start Using Minder AI
points: Workers log in and interact using voice commands
Continuous learning and optimization from usage

Capabilities.sectionTitle: One Platform for the Entire Operation
items: Ask the operation anything, in plain language

CTA.lead: If your workers are juggling between machines and shifts and you’re curious how to save cost and increase productivity.
